description_en: Adélaïde may not be a Muslim-majority destination, but it welcomes Muslim travelers with real halal options. You'll find 20 halal restaurants and 6 mosques nearby, plus real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — everything to explore Adélaïde, Australia, with peace of mind.
metaDescription_en: Halal guide to Adélaïde: 20+ halal restaurants, 6 mosques, prayer times and tips for Muslim travelers. Halal Trust Score 3.2/5.
